TITLE
	L2-03 Storage Tank Test ;

GDAT
	FILE w=tokyo_3column_SI.has ;
	RUN (12/25) 1/1-1/3 ;
	PRINT 1/1-1/3 *wd ;
*

EXSRF
	r=0.2 ;
	south a=0.0 ;
	north a=180.0 ;
	east  a=90.0 ;
	west  a=270.0 ;
	Hor ;
	earth Z=1.5 ;
*

WALL
	-E:ExtWall  RC-150 FPS-50 GPB-12 ;
	-R:Roof     FPS-100 GPB-12 ;
	-F:Floor    GPB-12 FPS-100 RC-150 ;
*

ROOM
	TestRoom  Vol=100.0
		*s
		alc=4.6
		south: -E ExtWall 20.0 ;
		north: -E ExtWall 20.0 ;
		east:  -E ExtWall 12.5 ;
		west:  -E ExtWall 12.5 ;
		Hor:   -R Roof 40.0 ;
		earth: -F Floor 40.0 ;
	*
*

EQPCAT
	BOI testboi Qo=5000 ;
	STANK testtank Vol=0.3 KAside=2.0 KAtop=1.0 KAbtm=1.0
		-S N=5 C:1-5 D:5-1 * ;
*

SYSCMP
	Boiler -c testboi ;
	Tank -c testtank -env Ta -Tinit 20 ;
*

SYSPTH
	ChargePath -sys A -f W
		> (0.05) Boiler Tank[C] > ;
	DischargePath -sys B -f W
		> (0.05) Tank[D] > ;
*

CONTL
	ChargePath=ChargeSchedule ;
	LOAD -e Boiler Boiler_Tout=60 ;
	%s -s ChargeSchedule 100-(-)-600 ;
*
*
